name: agy
description: Codex plugin for delegating work to the Antigravity CLI (agy).

interface.shortDescription: Delegate review and rescue workflows to Antigravity CLI
interface.longDescription: Use AGY from Codex to run Antigravity CLI setup checks, review current git changes, delegate bounded rescue tasks, and inspect background job results through the shared companion runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use AGY to review this change
Delegate a bounded rescue task to AGY
